title: schultesia pohliana
intro: Schultesia pohliana is a plant species, also known as the 'Pohlian Schultesia', belonging to the Rubiaceae family. It is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Schultesia pohliana include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce pain and inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Schultesia pohliana include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects.
